name: global-adhoc-arbitration-panel
description: Global Ad Hoc Arbitration Panel — secure online platform for administering ad hoc arbitration proceedings.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @gaap/api" "npm run dev -w @gaap/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @gaap/shared && npm run build -w @gaap/api && npm run build -w @gaap/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @gaap/api && npm run lint -w @gaap/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @gaap/shared && npm run typecheck -w @gaap/api && npm run typecheck -w @gaap/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @gaap/api && npm run test -w @gaap/web
